genes.title: Gene Therapy Targets Expanding
genes.prediction: The next 12 months will see a shift from monogenic to polygenic disease targets, driven by multiplex CRISPR and base editing advances. Watch for in vivo CAR-T gene delivery to dominate 2027 clinical pipelines.

gene_therapies.title: Gene Therapy Commercialization Wave
gene_therapies.prediction: With 3+ new approvals expected in 2026-2027, gene therapy is transitioning from clinical breakthrough to commercial reality. Key inflection: AAV manufacturing scale-up reducing per-patient cost below $500K.

crispr_applications.title: CRISPR Beyond Gene Knockout
crispr_applications.prediction: Prime editing and base editing will overtake traditional CRISPR-Cas9 in new clinical trials by 2027. Epigenome editing (CRISPRa/CRISPRi) is the dark horse — no DNA cuts, reversible, and entering Phase 1.

diseases.title: Rare Disease Renaissance
diseases.prediction: AI-driven phenotype matching and N=1 trial designs are enabling gene therapies for ultra-rare diseases. The "N-of-1" trial paradigm, validated by Baby KJ, will become standard for personalized CRISPR therapies.

genomic_diagnostics.title: Liquid Biopsy Goes Mainstream
genomic_diagnostics.prediction: Multi-cancer early detection (MCED) blood tests will achieve $99 price points by 2027, enabling population-level screening. cfDNA + AI analysis is the key enabler.

gene_delivery.title: Non-Viral Delivery Breakthrough
gene_delivery.prediction: LNP and exosome-based delivery will challenge AAV dominance for systemic gene therapy. The AAV immunogenicity problem is real — non-viral alternatives that solve it will capture significant market share.

regenerative_medicine.title: Cell Therapy Automation
regenerative_medicine.prediction: Automated cell manufacturing (closed-system bioreactors) will reduce CAR-T production costs by 60% and enable point-of-care manufacturing. This is the bottleneck that must break for cell therapy to scale.

top_signals.name: Approved Gene Therapies
top_signals.reason: Commercial stage gene therapies expanding rapidly

top_signals.name: Epigenome Editing
top_signals.reason: CRISPRa/CRISPRi entering Phase 1 — no DNA cuts

top_signals.name: In Vivo CAR-T
top_signals.reason: In vivo CAR gene delivery feasibility demonstrated

top_signals.name: Liquid Biopsy MCED
top_signals.reason: Multi-cancer early detection approaching 9 price point

top_signals.name: Hemophilia Gene Therapy
top_signals.reason: Phase 3 readouts pending, commercial viability near

cross_domain_insights.title: Gene Editing × AI: Convergence Accelerating
cross_domain_insights.description: AI-designed guide RNAs and protein engineering are reducing CRISPR off-target rates by 10x. The intersection of AI and gene editing is the highest-conviction bet in biotech.

cross_domain_insights.title: Gene Therapy × Nuclear: Radiopharmaceutical Gene Delivery
cross_domain_insights.description: Targeted radiopharmaceuticals combined with gene therapy vectors enable precision delivery to radiation-resistant tumors. Early-stage but potentially transformative.

cross_domain_insights.title: CRISPR × Quantum: Quantum-Optimized Guide RNA Design
cross_domain_insights.description: Quantum computing optimization of CRISPR guide RNA sequences could solve the multi-objective optimization problem (efficiency + specificity + delivery) simultaneously.
